Image Compress

Reduce the file size of your JPG, PNG or WEBP image. Set a target size in KB or adjust the quality slider. Works entirely in your browser — nothing is uploaded.

No Signup
Browser-based
Free to use
Privacy-first
Files stay on your device. Not uploaded anywhere.

Drop your image here or click to choose

Supports JPG, PNG and WEBP

Max 20MB per file

download

Advertisement

Ad space reserved for future

Advertisement space

Ad space reserved for future

Why Compress Images?

Many Indian government portals, exam registration systems, and job application websites have strict file size limits for photo uploads — commonly under 50KB, 100KB or 200KB. This tool lets you compress your image to meet those limits without needing any software.

How to Compress an Image

  1. Upload your JPG, PNG or WEBP image using the file picker or drag and drop
  2. Choose a quick target size preset (50KB, 100KB, 200KB, 500KB) or enter a custom target
  3. Or skip the target and use the quality slider for manual control
  4. Click "Compress Image" — see the before/after size comparison
  5. Download the compressed image

Compression Size Guide for Indian Portals

  • SSC CGL, CHSL, MTS: Candidate photo under 50KB
  • UPSC CSE, CDS: Photo under 40KB–300KB depending on portal
  • Banking (IBPS, SBI PO): Photo under 50KB, Signature under 20KB
  • NEET, JEE, CUET: Typically 10KB–200KB — check notification
  • Passport Seva: Photo under 1MB, face clearly visible
  • Railway NTPC / ALP: Photo under 100KB

Tips

  • JPG compression is lossy — slight quality loss is normal and usually invisible at print or screen size
  • PNG files are larger but lossless — best for signatures and screenshots
  • Very small target sizes (under 20KB) may require reducing dimensions as well — use Image Resize first
  • A photo taken in good lighting compresses much better than a dark or blurry photo
